message:
refactor(packages): embed clone_source in ParsedSource::Git variant to
avoid re-deriving it at each call site

Move the git_clone_source() computation from install_source() and
update_all() into parse_git_source() so the clone URL (which preserves
userinfo for authentication) is stored directly in the ParsedSource::Git
enum variant.

This eliminates the need to call git_clone_source(source, &self.cwd) at
every match site and ensures the clone URL is always consistent with
the parsed state:
- Add clone_source field to ParsedSource::Git
- Remove ad-hoc git_clone_source() calls from install_source() and
  update_all(), destructuring clone_source from the match instead
- Add .. catch-all to the package_info match arm for forwards compat
- Update tests to assert clone_source values, including verification
  that authenticated URLs preserve userinfo in the clone source while
  stripping it from the normalized repo identity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
